assignments.description: Adding to list to ensure using IN operator below flow to verify any unwanted record is not pulled in for execution.
assignments.name: Add_Account_to_List
assignments.label: Add Account to List

assignments.description: Adding to list to ensure using IN operator below flow to verify any unwanted record is not pulled in for execution.
assignments.name: Add_Contact_to_List
assignments.label: Add Contact to List

assignments.description: Assignment to add Case related data to multiple Lists
assignments.name: Prepare_List_for_Case
assignments.label: Prepare List for Case

assignments.description: Element to update individual case field value
assignments.name: Update_Case_Field_Values
assignments.label: Update Case Field Values

value.stringValue: Patient reference was deleted as per Right To Be Forgotten process

decisions.description: Flow Bypass is an architectural or procedural mechanism used to skip the flow.
decisions.name: Flow_Bypass
decisions.label: Flow Bypass

decisions.description: Check Individual having a RTBF Date as yesterday
decisions.name: Verify_RTBF_Date
decisions.label: Verify RTBF Date

Flow.description: Flow to purge all of patient account related data
Flow.label: Scheduled Patient Account Data Purge

loops.description: Looping through leads to prepare a list of lead ids which will help in querying related records
loops.name: Iterate_through_Leads
loops.label: Iterate through Leads

loops.description: Loop is required to prepare case Id List and update cases
loops.name: Loop_through_Cases
loops.label: Loop through Cases

recordLookups.description: Get All Related Accounts from Individuals
recordLookups.name: Get_Account_Record
recordLookups.label: Get Account Record

recordLookups.description: Get ACR Linked with Account and contact
recordLookups.name: Get_ACR
recordLookups.label: Get ACR

recordLookups.description: Get All Campaign Member associated with Account
recordLookups.name: Get_Campaign_Member
recordLookups.label: Get Campaign Member

recordLookups.description: Element to Get Cases Linked with Patient Account
recordLookups.name: Get_Cases
recordLookups.label: Get Cases

recordLookups.description: Get all Leads linked to individual
recordLookups.name: Get_Leads
recordLookups.label: Get Leads

recordUpdates.description: Update Data Purge Date on triggering individual
recordUpdates.name: Update_Individual
recordUpdates.label: Update Individual

recordUpdates.description: Update Task linked with Individual with proper comment
recordUpdates.name: Update_Task
recordUpdates.label: Update Task

recordUpdates.description: Update Task linked with Individual with proper comment
recordUpdates.name: Update_Task2
recordUpdates.label: Update Task

textTemplates.name: TaskComment
textTemplates.text: Customer ID record was deleted as a result of RTBF Inquiry

textTemplates.name: taskCommentOnError
textTemplates.text: RTBF Deletion Failed for Customer ID due to Error in following objects: {!formattedObjectNameString}

variables.description: Used to Get Case Related data
variables.name: caseIdList

variables.description: Holds Ids of Individual, helps in querying related records
variables.name: individualIDList

waits.description: A wait element to separate transaction on case and case history in order to ensure consistency and improve performance
waits.name: Wait
waits.label: Wait

waits.description: Wait Element to segregate Setup and Non-Setup DML
waits.name: Wait_for_1_minute
waits.label: Wait for 1 minute
